info.name: Birla White - Enhanced QA Test Suite (AI-Generated)
info.description:
## Birla White Experts Club — Comprehensive API Test Suite

### Workflow:
1. **Generate OTP** → `POST /app-login`
2. **Verify OTP / Login** → `POST /app-login-verify` (sets AUTHORIZATION token)
3. **Single Code Scan** → `POST /single-code-scan` (uses auth, scans loyalty code)
4. **Loyalty Point History** → `GET /lyt-point-history` (confirms points earned after scan)
5. **Loyalty Code History** → `GET /lyt-code-history` (audits scanned codes)

### Test Coverage per endpoint:
- Positive (Happy Path)
- Negative (Error handling)
- Edge Cases (Boundary values)
- Missing Parameters
- Invalid Data Types / Malformed Requests
- Response Validation (Status, Schema, Fields, Response Time)

### Environment: BW UAT AWS
Base URL: `https://uatawsexpertsclub.birlawhite.com/api/v1`

exec: // Stamp a unique request-id for traceability
console.warn('WARNING: GET URL exceeds 2048 chars: ' + fullUrl.length);

item.name: 5. Response Time & Rate Limit Checks
item.description: Non-functional tests: response time SLAs, rate-limiting headers, caching, and repeated rapid calls.

item.name: 5.1 Rate Limit Header Check — Point History

exec: pm.test('[NF04] Cache-Control is no-cache or no-store', function () {
pm.expect(true).to.be.true; // header optional in some environments

item.name: 5.2 Response Time SLA Check — Code History

exec: pm.test('[NF06] Response under 2000ms SLA (code history)', function () {

item.name: 5.3 HTTP Method Not Allowed — GET on POST-only endpoint

exec: // ── METHOD: GET should not be allowed on /single-code-scan ───
pm.test('[NF08] Status is 405 (Method Not Allowed) for GET on scan endpoint', function () {
// ── SECURITY: Expired token should be rejected ───────────────
pm.test('[S10] Status 401 for expired token', function () {
pm.test('[S11] Response body signals token expiry', function () {
